case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. SHAUNICE GEORGE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEORGE, SHAUNICE $1,145.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,230.50, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT.
